The '''''Humbarine Housekeepers HoloBook''''' was a [[Book/Legends|cookbook]] first published several [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]] [[Galactic Standard Calendar|prior]] to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Its recipes served as the default database of the [[COO-series cook droid/Legends|COO cook droid]].
